# EDPB Guidelines on Personal Data Breach Notification

Jurisdiction: European Union / EEA
Region: EU
Citation: Guidelines 9/2022 on personal data breach notification under GDPR
Authority: European Data Protection Board
Source URL: https://www.edpb.europa.eu/our-work-tools/our-documents/guidelines/guidelines-92022-personal-data-breach-notification-under_en
Topics: security_breach, notice_transparency, accountability
Keywords: personal data breach notification, 72 hours, risk to rights and freedoms, EDPB

## Summary
EDPB guidance on GDPR personal data breach notification to supervisory authorities and affected individuals.

## Key compliance obligations
- Assess breach risk promptly and document decisions.
- Notify supervisory authority within 72 hours where required.
- Communicate high-risk breaches to affected individuals.
